name: Triple Flag Precious Metals
confidenceReason: Most attractive valuation among precious metals streamers (lowest P/E, best PEG ~1.0, highest FCF yield). Zero debt and negative beta. But smallest/least liquid of the group with limited analyst coverage.
bullCase: Triple Flag is the most attractively valued precious metals streamer, trading at a trailing P/E of ~32x versus 42-74x for peers. The PEG ratio of ~1.0 suggests fair value relative to growth. The company has zero net debt, 61.7% net margins, and a clear production growth path to 140-150K GEOs by 2030. At $8B market cap, TFPM is a potential acquisition target. The negative beta (-0.21) provides excellent portfolio diversification.
bearCase: TFPM is the smallest and least liquid of the precious metals streamers. The stock has surged from $17 to $39 in 12 months (+129%), leaving limited upside to current consensus targets ($32-$35 USD). Analyst targets actually imply downside from current prices. The Steppe Gold default in Q3 2025 highlights counterparty risk inherent in smaller streaming portfolios. Forward P/E of 34.7x is higher than trailing P/E, suggesting near-term earnings may disappoint.
